summary: React and platform signals point to tighter server boundaries and clearer ownership.

sections.executiveSummary: Teams should align on incremental adoption of server components while preserving delivery predictability.
topSignals: TypeScript 5.x tightens inference for large monorepos
signalVsNoise: Vendor keynote announcements without shipping artifacts remain noise
leadershipImplications: Staff engineers should sponsor thin-slice pilots with explicit rollback criteria
aiOrchestrationImplications: Agent workflows need citation-backed inputs before summarization
frontendArchitectureImplications: Colocate data boundaries with route segments to reduce accidental coupling
sections.recommendedAction: Pick one production route to migrate behind a server boundary this sprint.

termOfDay.explanation: UI rendered on the server and streamed to the client without shipping component logic.

reflectionPrompt: Which team ritual would make your next architecture bet reversible within one week?
